Preset Updates: Fixed a bug which caused Target Confirmed relics to drop before cards were obtained.
Option Updates: Added Fire Lord and Ice Lord Palettes to change Alucard's appearance.
Added Jade Lining and Slate Lining to change Alucard's appearance.
Separated out the Quality of Life functions from Tournament Mode and added a new security feature to the same.
The new homes for the Quality of Life features are Zero-Dollar Relic Mode and Open Clock Statue Mode.
Dev's Stash now may house upcoming changes that have yet to find a home despit being 'complete'.
Website Updates: Fixed a bug causing presets minimum complexity to override player-selected somplexity.
Separated older Change Log entries into a new section under 'Randomizer' in the hotbar.
Added 'Relic Locations' under 'Player Guides' in the hotbar.
Added an external link to a dynamic relic locations map in the hotbar.
Program Updates: Fixed an issue where renamed relics were incorrectly displayed in the Long Library shop menu.
Yasutsuna hitbox now follows Alucard like Masamune et al. It's still spammable.
Rando Tools Updates: Updated Co-Op to work through websocket connection, dramatically simplifying how users activate the mode.

Option Updates: Added additional route options by opening Colosseum shortcut and Alchemy Jewel of open door if the player starts in Royal Chapel with Starting Room Randomizer.
Fixed a bug where Bloody Tears was overriding default palettes on Alucard.
Program Updates: Corrected a bug in the Accessibility Patches that prevented the Forbidden Route scroll lock entity from being fixed.
Added a crash handler to the game. Now crashes will display what, why, and how for devs to research what went wrong.
Minor Constants updates, maybe some of the splash phrases will appear correctly, now.
Team Updates: Congratulations to our new co-owner: CRAZY4BLADES!

Website Updates: Removed a bug where certain other options weren't properly toggled by the switches.
Program Updates: Established coding style guidelines.
Code cleanup on utils and some constants assignments.
Updated help info to be more accurate and more helpful.
Team Updates: 3snow_p7im requested to be removed from the front page. We thank him for the foundation he built for us.

Preset Updates: What is "Glitch"? How do you define "Glitch"? If "Glitch" is what eldri7ch can see, taste, and touch....
Website Updates: (Hotfix) Corrected an issue where Tournament presets were producing incorrect equipment.
Removed a bug where certain options weren't properly toggled by the switches.
Launcher Updates: Removed a bug where certain options weren't properly toggled by the switches.

Preset Updates: Removed a logic issue where Bat was required for the Jewel sword and Beryl Circlet checks in Big Toss.
I swear to God, eldri7ch'll pistol whip the next guy that says "Glitch".
Options Updates: Added the starting Stat Randomizer option.
Familiar cards now have a 1/69 chance to become Foil when the Color Randomizer is enabled.
Familiar cards now have a 1/420 chance to become Inverse Foil when the Color Randomizer is enabled.
Foiled Familiar Cards will now produce alternate-color familiars.
Program Updates: Added support for forcing one or more items to spawn in a preset’s relic locations using the goalItem flag.
Fixed a command-line bug where disabling music randomization prevented the preset name from being passed to the game menu screen.
Added buffs for the Badelaire and Jewel Sword. Badelaire now scales with minutes instead of hours, and the Jewel Sword now receives its Saturn-version buffs.

Preset Updates: Added Lycanthrope Spring 2026 Tournament Edition preset.
Added Nimble Lite Spring 2026 Tournament Edition preset.
Added Warlock Spring 2026 Tournament Edition preset.
Fixed an error where Bounty Hunter variants could not generate their Cards / place Vlad relics.
Adjusted Rat Race shop price and sell price to trivialize random cash bags found in the preset.
Glitch is life, Glitch is eternal. Glitch will forever remain [TBD].
Option Updates: Incorporated a new Easy Mode where we combined an invincibility frame extension with simplified inputs.
Added Single-Hit Gears to make Clock Tower and Reverse Clock Tower less frustrating.
Removed potential softlock when starting above Richter in Castle Keep using Starting Room Randomizer.
Website Updates: Fixed an error that caused music not to randomize from the website.
Fixed an error which caused certain presets not to trigger the Goals changes.
Program Updates: Added new function and supporting code to convey to the Rando Tools the actual Complexity and Relic Location Extension used.
Patched an issue where killing Ctulhu in the Marble Gallery would prevent a scroll lock entity from spawning.

Website Updates: Removed a major bug that would cause presets to generate with / without randomizations counter to what was indicated by website selections.
Project Updates: Incorporated the SOTN Rando Tools into the main repo library and Crazy4Blades took over leading production on those.
Keep an eye on the new repo to make sure you have the most updated tools in case those aren't automatically upgraded for you.
Rando Tools Updates: Added complexity and Relic Extension disclosures to the tracker.
Corrected a lot of errors regarding how relics and relic locations are tracked and displayed.

Program Updates: Removed a bug that would cause map reveal in reverse outer wall.
Corrected an error that caused the tracker to show both castle's checks in one castle.

Preset Changes: Temporarily added several tournament presets.
Removed nerf to all thrust swords and only nerfed the thrust damage of Obsidian Sword in Boss Rush.
Fixed an issue where Gravity Boots didn't turn off second Leap Stone additional jumps in Recycler.
Removed menu lock when attempting to save in Gear Rush.
Removed Succubus fight in Gear Rush since player could not enter Nightmare. Relic now spawns by default.
eldri7ch fell into a Glitch.
Options Changes: No Prologue Mode removes the grand entrance of Alucard to allow the SOTN Rando Tools to start / stop LiveSplit.
Program Updates: Increased character limit for preset data on main menu screen from 30 characters to 50.
Updated color coding to RGBA32 for ease of programming.
Moved all randomization into a single core randomization module to maintain parity in generation and to streamline future coding.

Preset Changes: Added the new Anguish preset.
Added the new Gear Rush preset.
Name Code: APERTURE gives the player Gold and Silver ring to access Dracula early by visiting Maria at the Holy glasses location.
Name Code: SLOWPOKE increases the amount of time given to the player to 25 minutes and also gives the rings to access Dracula early.
Name Code: IAMSPEED decreases the amount of time the player has to 7 minutes. (No rings given)
Name Code: GTI-CLUB gives the player $250,000 in game, just like the Sega Saturn version.
Made the new Vlad relic effects take effect based on whether the relic is on or off in Recycler.
Added additional jumps to having two Leap Stone turned on in Recycler.
The Glitch logic issues aren't real; they can't hurt you.
Options Changes: Fixed a bug where the relic at Power of Wolf wouldn't appear when Starting Room Rando was enabled.
Added a new mystery feature to Dev's Stash.
Fixed an issue where Reverse Library Cards wouldn't function on presets that had the map pre-purchased by the preset. (Hotfix)
Fixed an issue where Second Castle Random Start movement wouldn't function on presets that had the map pre-purchased by the preset. (Hotfix)
Website Changes: Added the Map Tool to compare maps for 200.6% runs.

Preset Changes: Added Elemental Chaos to Max Rando.
Fixed an issue with Bounty Hunter, Battle Mage, Hitman, Target Confirmed, and Rampage needing Demon Card in alternate extensions.
The time of the eldri7ch is over, the age of the Glitch has come.
Color Randomizer removed from all presets as a default option.
Removed outer wall teleporter for Mirror Breaker.
Option Changes: Re-worked many enemies in Enemy Stat Randomizer.
Added enemy projectiles to Enemy Stat Randomizer.
Randomized certain bosses' attack elements in Enemy Stat Randomizer.
Corrected a lot of name card issues in Enemy Stat Randomizer.
Removed ability for enemy weakness to also be their resist, immunity, or absorb.
Patched a bug where new immunities would not remove absorbs and vice versa.
Website Changes: Options enabled by the presets will no longer be able to be turned off (temporary solution).

Preset Changes: Removed $700 and $5000 drops from Rat Race.
Guaranteed drops for Hitman, Target Confirmed, and Rampage.
Has anyone really been far even as decided to use even go fix to do Glitch more like?
Option Changes: Removed game freeze in Colosseum room with Valhalla Knights.

Notes: Beginning of a new initiative to audit and quality-control presets.
Deprecated presets removed from the website but still available offline.
Preset JSON files reorganized for clarity and developer readability.

Added Oracle preset.
Added Mirror Breaker preset.

Re-named Bounty Hunter: TC to Target Confirmed.

Fixed a bug that caused a game crash if the player left the CD room at the start of a second-castle start seed to the left.
Preset audit successful — nearly every preset re-weighted and keys sorted.

Added palettes for Wolf form to match Alucard palettes.

Program Updates: Added randomized splash phrases to the game title screen.
Added a feature where updated goals can be added to preset files using letter codes.
Website Updates: Allowed players to generate custom relic extensions and complexity levels with all presets.

Added the SOTNRando icon to the navigation bar.

Added a new section to help players preview sprite customizations.

Tools Updates: Upgraded Map View to give more detailed information about entities and properly name more of them.

Options Changes: Added new option to change seed goals.
All Bosses changes the goal to defeat all bosses listed on the time attack table.
All Relics changes the goal to collect all relics in the NA version.
All Bosses and Relics combines both goals.

Randomizer now loads 14 sectors from the ISO automatically.
